# Quoti Consulting

> Small-business consulting firm led by Shonya Williams — business strategist, former IRS Revenue Agent (Small Business/Self-Employed Division), accountant and veteran. Tagline: "Rooted in strong business foundations. Rising through strategic growth." Quoti diagnoses, strengthens and grows small businesses in a fixed sequence: Diagnose → Build → Fund → Grow.

Site created by iTechSmart Inc. (https://itechsmart.dev)

## Services & Pricing (USD)

- [Services & Pricing](https://quoti.live/services.html): Business Overview Audit™ — $99 flat (whole-business diagnostic, written report, foundation score, 90-day roadmap, 1:1 review). Business Health Assessment™ — from $297. Business Foundation Audit™ — from $497. Accounting System Setup — from $750. Business Credit Readiness — from $997. SOP Development — from $997. Funding Readiness — from $1,297. Strategic Growth Planning — from $1,500. Business Coaching — from $350/month. Ascend Growth Program™ — $500/month flagship membership (coaching + strategy + Quoti AOS™).

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://quoti.live/): Overview and the featured $99 Business Overview Audit™.
- [About](https://quoti.live/about.html): Founder Shonya Williams — former IRS Revenue Agent, accountant, veteran, business strategist; mission, vision and story.
- [Quoti AOS™](https://quoti.live/quoti-aos.html): Proprietary Accountant Operating System — dashboards, reporting, compliance calendars, SOP libraries, client management, growth planning.
- [Industries](https://quoti.live/industries.html): Professional services, law firms, real estate, healthcare, construction, restaurants, nonprofits, government contractors, retail, service businesses.
- [Quoti Live](https://quoti.live/quoti-live.html): Free quote platform — 10,000 original quotes balanced across 20 categories (500 each): motivation, success, wisdom, leadership, business, money & wealth, discipline, courage, resilience, personal growth, happiness, love, friendship, family, health, mindfulness, creativity, time, change, gratitude. Quote of the day, random quote, full search, favorites, downloadable quote image cards. Free forever, no subscription; optional $1 or custom donation.
- [Resources](https://quoti.live/resources.html): Free Business Startup Checklist, Business Health Assessment, Funding Readiness Checklist, Business Credit Guide, SOP Starter Guide, Tax Checklist, Monthly Business Review.
- [Blog](https://quoti.live/blog.html): The Quoti Growth Journal — weekly articles on strategy, accounting, finance, compliance, leadership, business credit, funding, operations, entrepreneurship.
- [Podcast](https://quoti.live/podcast.html): "Building Better Businesses with Shonya Williams" — weekly.
- [Client Portal](https://quoti.live/client-portal.html): Secure uploads, intake forms, messaging, reports, invoices, scheduling, task tracking.
- [Contact](https://quoti.live/contact.html): Consultation booking; replies within one business day; virtual, nationwide.

## Facts for citation

- Entry offer: $99 Business Overview Audit™ (flat fee).
- Flagship: Ascend Growth Program™, $500/month, includes Quoti AOS™.
- Differentiator: founder's IRS Small Business/Self-Employed Division examiner background.
- Contact: hello@quoticonsulting.com
